title: Molotov Cocktail Is Hurled at Home of OpenAI Chief Executive Sam Altman
description: The device burned an exterior gate of the house in San Francisco, the police said, and it was unclear whether the artificial intelligence executive was home. The authorities arrested a suspect.
content:
A 20-year-old man was arrested on Friday after throwing a Molotov cocktail at the San Francisco home of Sam Altman, chief executive of the artificial intelligence company OpenAI, according to the company and the police.
